title: ANGRAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: Acharya N.G. Ranga Agricultural University (ANGRAU) has announced the latest job notification for the recruitment of various Senior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in  M.Sc can use this chance and apply for the ANGRAU Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are look...
